ValidationRule.description: prevents the user from changing the ship date on unlocked units for natt amendments if the unit has an original order - ie upgraded asset
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( BEGINS(NATT_Quote_Recordtype_Dev_Name__c,"NATT_Units_Quote"), !ISBLANK(SBQQ__UpgradedAsset__c), NATT_Locked__c = TRUE, NATT_Is_Base_Unit__c = TRUE, ISCHANGED(NATT_Requested_Ship_Date__c) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: You may not change the ship date on a locked ordered unit.
